name: recoup-song-analysis
description: Turn a song's audio into metadata, lyrics, playlist pitches, sync briefs, and mix feedback using Recoup's audio language model (Music Flamingo).

interface.shortDescription: Turn a song's audio into metadata, lyrics, playlist pitches, sync briefs, and mix feedback
interface.longDescription: Song audio analysis for AI agents. Point it at a public audio URL and get structured catalog metadata, transcribed lyrics, DSP playlist pitches, music-supervisor sync briefs, and technical mix feedback — powered by Recoup's audio language model (Music Flamingo).
